root.name: add_text_box_with_hyperlink_to_slide_1
root.description: Evaluates if a text box with 'More Information' was added to slide 1 and correctly hyperlinked to slide 34.

children.name: text_box_added_slide_1
children.description: Checks if a text box containing 'More Information' was added to slide 1.

children.name: hyperlink_added_to_text
children.description: Checks if the text 'More Information' on slide 1 is hyperlinked to slide 34.

children.name: no_extraneous_changes
children.description: Checks for absence of unrelated changes to slides, content, or hyperlinks.

metadata.task: Add a text box to slide 1 with the text "More Information", and then add a hyperlink on the text 'More Information' that links to slide 34
